title: Revert "Cirrus: Temp. workaround missing imgprune image"
body:
Also includes one other occasional/minor flake-fix

This reverts commit 9b2e98f1e872354f0708a86b59e16b8b86e9f8b2.

@baude I tested and verified behavior, FROM does need to specify the FQIN (annoyingly).  I'll return the nice cookie you gave me...errr...shortly (munch...munch) :grin:
This one is ready to go, @mheon @baude PTAL when things settle down.
@cevich I think this needs a rebase
Uggg, I thought I just rebased/pushed it this morning.  Rolling it again...
